synopsis.value:
During the Ming Dynasty (mid-1500s), Lin Shao Chun, the daughter of a disgraced official, joins a performing troupe after her family falls from grace. There, she meets Sun Yu Lou, a wealthy heir who falls for her. Determined to avenge her family, she disguises herself as a man to take civil service exams. Despite his family's opposition, Sun Yu Lou supports her, and they marry. However, Lin Shao Chun uncovers a connection

between her husband's family and her own family's downfall, leaving her torn.

value.characterName: Sun Shi Jie [Sun family's eldest son]
Sun Xun / Wen Zhao [Sun family's patriarch]
Sun You Zhen / Imperial Consort Sun [Sun family's eldest daughter]
Jia Yun Peng / Gu Ye [Feng Yuan's brother]
Liu Wu Shuang [Shao Chun's senior brother]
Mrs. Ding [Rong Shou's wife / Senior maidservant]
Mrs. Wang [Qing Xi's wife / Senior maidservant]
Du Shi Qing [Governor of Shuntian prefecture]
Wu Mian [Chief examiner of imperial examination] (Ep. 5)
Liu Ying [Director of Superintendent of Salaries] (Ep. 9)
Qu Ling Er [Jun Hao's first love] (Ep. 26)
Jia Zhen [Feng Yuan & Yun Peng's father] (Ep. 41)
